---
title: "Nick Katz"
image: images/profile.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nick-katz-97bb04255/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nickkatz625
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:nickkatz575@gmail.com"
---

### Reutrn-To-Throw Rehab Analyst

I am a Biology major and Data Science minor at **Lawrence University**. My mission is to bridge the gap between strength and conditioning and throwing rehabilitation, utilizing data analytics to push our understanding of the throw. 

By leveraging **R**, **Python**, and **biometric data**, I specialize in optimizing pitching strategies and developing **Return-To-Throw** protocols that prioritize both high-velocity performance and long-term player health. My research uses systems like **Armcare.com**, **driveline PUlSE**, and **FlexProGrip** to target the musclatrure closely related to the UCL, looking to find potent training modalities to use in return-to-throw programming.
